When the remote peer sends an `RST_STREAM` for that stream, or when the accumulated content exceeds `maxContentLength`, the decoder removes the entry from the map but **never releases the pooled ByteBuf**, permanently leaking the allocated memory.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00524, "percentile": 0.41234}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jppx-w49h-x2qq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T21:32:24Z",
